_comment: Plugin-mode hooks (loaded by Claude Code plugin runtime). Uses ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} — a plugin runtime variable that resolves to the plugin's install cache directory. The marketplace plugin is the ONLY CC install path (the Go installer's CC path is retired — it now installs the opencode runtime only). Every gate below runs through hooks/run-ts-hook.sh <name>, a fail-closed launcher with no gate logic of its own — it execs node against the matching hooks/ts/dist/<name>.cjs bundle, which carries the actual decision logic (TS is the single source of gate logic for CC and opencode). Launcher contract (F5, three classes): deny-floors (policy-block, dev-guard, gcp-guard, prepublish-guard, checkpoint-guard) emit an explicit deny envelope and block when node or the .cjs artifact is missing — never pass-through; worktree-guard is advisory/fail-open by contract, so a missing node/.cjs is a silent exit 0 (loses only the reminder, never escalates to deny); observational hooks (notify-stage, subagent-trace, precompact-snapshot, language-user-prompt, session-start) silently exit 0 when node/.cjs is missing. SessionStart (matcher startup|resume|clear) runs session-start — the unified loader that surfaces dev-mode banner+disposition, configured default language, and obsidian workspace base-path all in one combined JSON; UserPromptSubmit re-asserts the configured language as a terse per-turn reminder adjacent to each operator message; policy gate (PreToolUse Bash|Write|Edit|NotebookEdit) fires on every write/exec tool to secret-scan content; outward-action gate (PreToolUse Bash) gates dev-mode outward actions — separate entry from policy-block so dev-guard never fires on Edit/Write/NotebookEdit; gcp verb-classifying gate (PreToolUse Bash) gates gcloud mutating/destructive/catastrophic verbs — separate entry so gcp-guard only fires on Bash; worktree advisory gate (PreToolUse Bash) emits start-gate reminder on agent-issued git checkout -b / switch -c / worktree add — fail-open, cannot cover human own-terminal ops; pre-publish papercut gate (PreToolUse Bash) blocks on missing plugin version bump (git push) or failing prepublish_check (gh pr create) — block-on-condition / open-on-fault, always-on enforcement floor, SEPARATE additive sibling to dev-guard (both co-match git push and gh pr create independently), never emits allow; reasoning-checkpoint guard (PreToolUse Task) gates phase dispatch; subagent-start breadcrumb (PreToolUse Task) runs node hooks/ts/dist/subagent-start.cjs directly (not through the launcher — observational, fail-open by its own design) — a deterministic backstop that appends a subagent.start breadcrumb to the same 00-subagent-trace.jsonl for th:* dispatches BEFORE the subagent runs (complements the SubagentStop breadcrumb below), never gated by TH_HOOK_PROFILE; notification (Notification) fires only on idle_prompt; SubagentStop (matcher th:.*) runs subagent-trace — fail-open coarse backstop that appends a deterministic subagent.stop breadcrumb to 00-subagent-trace.jsonl whenever a th:* pipeline subagent finishes (complements, never replaces, the orchestrator's phase.end); PreCompact (matcher manual|auto) runs precompact-snapshot — fail-open state snapshot that copies 00-state.md to a rolling sibling before context compaction so /th:recover survives a mid-pipeline compact; notify-stage, subagent-trace, and precompact-snapshot are gated by TH_HOOK_PROFILE (minimal suppresses them; standard/strict enable them; default unset == standard) — this gate now lives in hooks/ts/bodies/hook-profile.ts, read by each observational body; enforcement floors (policy-block, dev-guard, gcp-guard, worktree-guard, prepublish-guard, checkpoint-guard) are always-on and NEVER gated by TH_HOOK_PROFILE.
